summary: Full-stack testing of the Chinese Parenting AI prototype. 9/9 pytest backend tests pass (feed, child CRUD, chat seeding/advancing, image->emergency switch, task generation/patching/insights, privacy GET/PUT/wipe). Frontend mobile (390x844) flow verified end-to-end: onboarding -> home feed with 6 typed cards -> chat with AI opener + quick replies -> sending messages triggers tasks_generated transition card with '查看任务清单' button -> tasks tab + feedback bottom sheet -> profile/wipe button present. Bottom tab navigation works.

issues: First card image (card_food_picky Unsplash URL ...1604908554027...) appears blank in screenshot — likely slow/failed image load; second card (bilingual school) renders correctly. Consider local image fallback or onError handling.

react_native_issues.issue: Console warning: 'props.pointerEvents is deprecated. Use style.pointerEvents'. RN 0.74+ deprecation; non-blocking but should be migrated to style.pointerEvents in affected component(s).

action_items: (Low) Add onError image fallback or use a CDN/local asset for card_food_picky to avoid blank image area when Unsplash is slow.
(Low) Replace deprecated `pointerEvents` prop with `style={{ pointerEvents: ... }}` to silence RN warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is ~680 lines and starting to mix models/scripts/routes; consider splitting into routers (chat/tasks/privacy/feed) if it grows further.
_generate_tasks_for builds `src` twice (line 548 + 550); second overwrites first — minor dead code.

task_insights streak logic returns 7 if today has no completion but yesterday does (because `if i > 0: break` only triggers after the first miss past index 0) — works correctly for the assertion done here, but logic intent could be clearer.
PUT /api/children does not validate child_id presence in URL vs body — fine since body is ChildCreate, but PUT after 404 is good. OK.
seed_data_creation: Tests created and self-cleaned a TEST_baby child; final test (privacy/wipe) clears all collections. After UI run a new child '小宝' (18mo) and ~3 tasks remain in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/test_parenting_api.py — last test wipes all data, so re-running is safe but UI state will be reset to onboarding. testIDs verified: onboarding-nickname-input, onboarding-months-input, onboarding-submit-btn, feed-card-ask-<card_id>, chat-input, chat-send-btn, chat-image-btn, tab-home/tab-tasks/tab-profile, task-check-<id>, mood-😊, task-feedback-submit, privacy-wipe-btn.
rca_of_issue: No bugs requiring RCA. Both AI mock scripting (deterministic step advancement, image-triggered emergency switch, transition->task seeding) and the privacy wipe-all chain work as designed.
